description: CompositionGrey checked trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with flaps, plastic zipper and button closure on the front, loops on the waist to secure a belt, brand tab above the right hip pocket and extended hems that can be trimmed to suit the wearer's heightFittingMid-rise, narrow FitWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not wring, bleach or tumble dryDry flat in shadeMedium ironUpgrade your sophisticated style with these trousers from turtle. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers make it perfect for casual wear. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team these with shirts or tees and jackets. Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6.3" and waist 32"
